title: deguelia macroloba
intro: Deguelia macroloba, also known as the 'Kola tree', is a tropical plant native to West Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Deguelia macroloba include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to treat various skin conditions and wounds. Deguelia macroloba is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional West African medicine to treat a range of ailments.
